settings.text: A selection of projects from the last few years. Every one was led by a named engineer from discovery through launch, with weekly demos and working software from the start.

settings.title: Northlight — Revenue intelligence dashboard
settings.description: A reporting platform for a Series B analytics company. React, TypeScript, ClickHouse, Tailwind. 14 weeks, end-to-end.

settings.title: Quanta — SaaS onboarding rewrite
settings.description: Rebuilt the self-serve onboarding for a growth-stage B2B SaaS. Activation up 38% in the first quarter. Next.js, Postgres, Stripe.

settings.title: Fieldwork — Field-ops mobile web app
settings.description: A durable, offline-first progressive web app for technicians in the field. React, IndexedDB, and a Rust-powered sync layer.

settings.title: Arbor — Design system & documentation site
settings.description: Shared component library, token system, and docs platform for a thirty-person product org. Storybook + MDX + custom Markdown pipeline.

settings.title: Cartograph — Internal CMS for editorial teams
settings.description: Custom content management system for a digital publisher. Role-based publishing, scheduled releases, full audit log. Remix + Postgres.

settings.title: Parallel — Billing & subscription platform
settings.description: Stripe-integrated billing system with multi-currency, proration, and VAT-compliant invoicing for a European SaaS.

settings.quote: They shipped the thing we'd been trying to build for a year, in four months, and taught our team how to own it afterward.
settings.name: Ana Voß
settings.title: CTO, Northlight

settings.quote: Weekly demos forced us to make decisions weekly. Best engineering engagement we've ever run — and the code still looks good two years later.
settings.name: Daniel Ishikawa
settings.title: Head of Product, Quanta

settings.quote: Offline-first mobile web isn't easy. Codebase made it look like it was. Three hundred field technicians now depend on what they built.
settings.name: Priya Chandra
settings.title: VP Engineering, Fieldwork

settings.quote: They gave us a design system our whole org actually adopted — which everyone who's tried this knows is the hard part.
settings.name: Lukas Berger
settings.title: Design Director, Arbor

settings.text: Tell us what you're building. We'll reply within two business days.
